new_nodes.content: Backend defect repair patch implementation passed: 43/43 tests passed (17 new, 9 M1 regression, 17 M2 generalization). Context registry final supported fields: entry_price, holding_days, unrealized_pnl_pct, max_unrealized_pnl_pct, partial_exit_count, position_pnl_pct (deprecated alias). position_pnl_pct handling: compile-time accepted, evaluator aliases to unrealized_pnl_pct, absolute percent -7 normalized to decimal -0.07. universal_factor.py KeyError now raises RuntimeError.

updated_nodes.reason: Patch implementation completed and all 43 tests passed.
